title: Office of Naval Research
description: NRE Connect provides an opportunity for new connections in areas of science and technology (S&T) research that are of interest to NRE program officers in the advancement of naval technological capability. Simply introduce yourself and your area(s) of expertise to be added, and help increase our experts' awareness of scientific expertise around the world.
text:
ONR's Total Human Force Capital department is building new ways to connect researchers from across government, industry and academia with the talented program officers across the Naval Research Enterprise (NRE): NRE Connect.
NRE Connect provides an opportunity for new connections in areas of science and technology (S&T) research that are of interest to NRE program officers in the advancement of naval technological capability. Simply introduce yourself and your area(s) of expertise to be added, and help increase our experts' awareness of scientific expertise around the world.
ONR Wants to Connect With You!
Research partnerships and collaboration are the backbone to advancing science and technology — ONR places great importance on increasing opportunities for new partnerships and finding the best talent to help tackle the U.S. Navy's biggest technological challenges. We hope you will share your expertise with our experts to help build the pathway to future connections.
